headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Raymond James Finl, Lowers Price Target to $158
summary: UBS  analyst Michael Brown   maintains Raymond James Finl (NYSE:RJF) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $176 to $158.

headline: Many on Wall Street saw this 'TACO' coming as Trump's brinkmanship starts to lose grip on market

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Raymond James Finl, Lowers Price Target to $174
summary: Barclays  analyst Benjamin Budish   maintains Raymond James Finl (NYSE:RJF) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $196 to $174.
